elements.focus: appears above sticky header without motion

elements.hover: foreground to primaryHover over 180ms; no movement
text color plus underline scale 0 to 1 over 180ms; no movement
elements.scrollMotion: native smooth scroll unless reduced motion

elements.openMotion: overlay opacity 0 to 1 over 180ms; sheet translateX 100% to 0 over 220ms cubic-bezier(.2,0,0,1)

elements.hover: trigger color over 180ms; option background over 120ms
elements.focus: Radix roving focus; Escape restores trigger focus
elements.openMotion: opacity 0 to 1 and scale .98 to 1 over 120ms from trigger-side origin

elements.hover: color, border, shadow, and translateY 0 to -2px over 180ms
none; no zoom, tilt, lightbox, tooltip, or pointer cursor
none except Tooltip where visible text is insufficient
elements.focus: only a real tooltip trigger may receive focus
elements.scrollMotion: included with parent; no individual stagger

elements.action: standard play, pause, seek, volume, captions, speed, PiP, and fullscreen controls
elements.hover: large play color and scale 1 to 1.04 over 160ms; standard timeline tooltip
elements.focus: immediate visible rings on every control
elements.scrollMotion: frame standard reveal once; Plyr loads within 600px of viewport
elements.fallback: native controls remain when JavaScript or Plyr fails

elements.hover: trigger color over 180ms; chevron rotation 0 to 180deg over 180ms
elements.openMotion: grid-row/height plus opacity over 200ms cubic-bezier(.2,0,0,1); no spring

elements.semantic: static ordered three-step process with a decorative solid connector and a dashed optional Retry branch used only after a voice provider error
elements.hover: none; no pointer cursor, lift, tooltip, or independent icon glow
elements.scrollMotion: heading and complete path reveal as two major groups; primary steps and the optional branch do not stagger

elements.semantic: static figure containing voice input, two available-provider articles, and a separate future-horizon group
elements.hover: none; no pointer cursor, lift, glow, tooltip, or route animation; every status and qualification remains visible
elements.scrollMotion: the complete map reveals once as one major group; provider nodes, icons, chips, connectors, and future horizon never stagger or animate independently
elements.reducedMotion: renders immediately with the same solid-current and dashed-future line styles

elements.hover: trigger color over 180ms; chevron rotation 0 to 180deg over 180ms
elements.openMotion: grid-row/height plus opacity over 200ms cubic-bezier(.2,0,0,1); normal document reflow

elements.hover: text color and underline over 180ms; no movement
elements.scrollMotion: footer standard reveal as one group

prohibited: motion on static cards that implies clickability
